beats.activity: Wake up, coffee, check sourdough starter and water plants.
beats.reasoning: Early riser habit. Sourdough and plant care are part of morning ritual. Energy was low yesterday (40/100), so staying home to ground himself before tackling the transit chaos.

beats.activity: Commute to First Hill office via rideshare due to Metro strike.
beats.reasoning: Bus strike until 4pm forces rideshare; surge pricing is expensive but necessary. Accountant must be at the office during tax season. Budget 50 min for strike congestion and rideshare pickup delays.

beats.activity: Tax season work: client files, spreadsheets, and compliance reviews.
beats.reasoning: Peak tax season demands long morning blocks. Mild weather and low energy suggest he'll power through work rather than slip out early like yesterday.

beats.activity: Lunch: phở bowl at the familiar spot near First Hill.
beats.reasoning: Adventurous eater with a new favorite. Same location as yesterday; this is becoming a ritual during tax season.

beats.activity: Back to office for afternoon tax work and client calls.
beats.reasoning: Tax season is relentless. No world events today pull him away; he stays focused to finish the day strong.

beats.activity: Commute home via rideshare (transit strike still active until 4pm, but rideshare is now normalizing).
beats.reasoning: Strike ends at 4pm, but 5:45pm is well after; buses should be resuming. However, rideshare is still safer bet. 60 min accounts for end-of-day traffic and strike recovery.

beats.activity: Shape sourdough, water plants, and prep dinner ingredients.
beats.reasoning: Part of his grounded routine. Mild 68F weather is perfect for sourdough work indoors. Low energy yesterday means a quiet evening at home suits him.

beats.activity: Dinner: simple herbs and fresh ingredients, maybe a glass of wine.
beats.reasoning: Adventurous eater who cooks at home. Quiet evening fits his values of close friends and solitude over crowds.

beats.activity: Darkroom work: organizing film negatives and contact sheets from recent hikes.
beats.reasoning: Film photography is a core passion. Low energy suggests he'll lose himself in this meditative work rather than go out. No social plans tonight.
8-hour rest at home, ending at 6:30am. Grounded day with low external stimulus allows for good sleep. Early riser will be ready for morning routine.

diary: Started the day like always—coffee and checking on my sourdough starter. The plants needed water; I've been neglecting them with tax season ramping up. The Metro strike threw a wrench into my morning, so I splurged on a rideshare to First Hill. The surge pricing stung, but I made it to the office by 7:45. Spent the morning buried in client files and compliance reviews. Grabbed my usual phở bowl at Phở Hòa around lunch—that place is a anchor for me. The afternoon was more of the same: spreadsheets, client calls, the familiar hum of tax season. Rideshare home was smoother once the strike ended. Back in South Lake Union, I shaped the sourdough and prepped dinner—just fresh herbs and simple ingredients, nothing fancy. Poured a glass of wine and spent the evening in the darkroom organizing negatives from my last few hikes. There's something grounding about that work, sorting through all those frames. Felt the tension in my shoulders ease.
thought_process: The transit strike initially frustrated me—I hate paying surge pricing—but it also reminded me I'm fortunate enough to have options. My mood was steady through the workday; tax season has a rhythm I know well, even if it's draining. Lunch at Phở Hòa felt like a necessary anchor point. The real shift came this evening when I moved to the darkroom. After hours of screens and numbers, handling film and organizing contact sheets felt like returning to myself. I chose to spend leisure time there deliberately—not hiking today, but tending to the memory of hikes. It settled something in me. The wine helped too. By evening, I was genuinely relaxed in a way the morning commute threatened to prevent.
world_event_prompt: Mild, partly cloudy Thursday, high of 68F. Citywide transit strike: all Metro buses and Link Light Rail suspended until 4pm. Rideshare surge pricing in effect.
